posture: Watch — landholder sentiment in New England warrants monitoring.

items.headline: Landholder concern over altered farming operations resurfaces in regional coverage
items.summary: Regional reporting highlighted landholder concerns about farming disruption and local-road damage linked to renewable projects.
items.so_what: Persistent landholder-impact framing is the leading edge of organised opposition; flag to community-engagement leads.

items.headline: NSW Farmers commentary on transmission easement terms
items.summary: Industry-body commentary continued to press on compensation and easement terms for host landholders.
items.so_what: A credible stakeholder voice; shifts here move the negotiating climate for access agreements.

items.headline: Corridor refinement updates published for New England
items.summary: EnergyCo published corridor-refinement material as route planning continues.
items.so_what: Corridor changes reset affected-landholder lists and can reopen consultation friction.

items.headline: Developer ASX disclosures reviewed — no material adverse items
items.summary: A scan of key developer announcements surfaced nothing materially adverse for REZ-connected projects.
items.so_what: Clean counterparty read for the day; baseline for trend detection.

items.headline: AEMO market notices reviewed — routine
items.summary: Daily market notices contained no REZ-specific constraints of note.
items.so_what: Operational baseline; escalate only on REZ-region constraints or connection events.
